title.en: If Tianfeng Hai wants to destroy this branch, i...

content.en:
Jinhe World.

This is a branch of the Netherworld Temple, and at this time, a large number of invincible people have gathered here, including many third-class invincibles.

And many invincible people from the Heavenly Wind Sea also came here, preparing to attack Jinhe Heaven and Earth and destroy this branch.

Of course, the Netherworld Temple is also an eternal power, and its strength is not weak.

If Tianfeng Hai wants to destroy this branch, it is naturally difficult.

But for many invincibles, as long as you kill a few invincibles, you will make a lot of money!

As for whether or not you can destroy Jinhe Heaven and Earth, it doesn't matter.

In fact, Tianfeng Sea has invaded Jinhe Heaven and Earth more than a dozen times, and each time it has been in vain.

On this day, Tianfeng Sea organized another invasion operation.

......

Netherworld Temple, Jinhe Branch.

At this time, hundreds of third-rank invincibles from the Netherworld Temple gathered here, if it was a normal time, it would be enough for the fourth-rank invincibles to guard here, but now that the Netherworld Temple is at war with the Heavenly Wind Sea, this branch will send so many third-rank invincibles.

A branch is not important, it can be changed at any time, and it is not of much value.

But for the Netherworld Temple, if a branch is pulled out, it is equivalent to falling into the disadvantage in the war with the Heavenly Wind Sea.

Therefore, they must keep the branch at all costs.

Bang!!!

The entire Jinhe branch was trembling, this was the invincible of the Heavenly Wind Sea who had come in.

The invincible people of the Netherworld Temple naturally did not sit still, and rushed out of the branch one by one, fighting with the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea in the void.

Every area of Jinhe Heaven and Earth was shattered, and the battle was extremely tragic.

And at this time, Ye Tian came here.

He saw an invincible man from the Netherworld, and smashed the opponent's body with a single punch, killing him with a single blow.

Then, he put away the other party's broken body and continued to search for the other invincible people in the Nether Temple.

After Ye Tian killed six invincible people in the Netherworld, he was discovered by the third-class invincible people in the Netherworld Temple.

Immediately, a third-class invincible person came towards Ye Tian.

"It's shameless that the third-rank invincible of the Heavenly Wind Sea actually sneaked up on the fourth- and fifth-rank invincible!" Bei He, the third-rank invincible of the Netherworld Temple, said angrily.

"Each other, didn't you also send third-class invincible people to surround and kill the fourth-class invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea before?, and the supreme ones of your Netherworld Temple even attacked the invincible ones, who do you say are more shameless?" Ye Tian sneered.

"You ......"

Beihe was so angry that he had nothing to say, so he didn't say anything.

Kill!

Beihe has performed an invincible skill - Binghe!

In an instant, this area was directly frozen, and even the rules of the Exotic World were frozen, which showed the power of this invincible skill.

And as soon as Ye Tian's body moved, he directly smashed Binghe, and immediately used his spatial invincible ancestral skill-shattering void!

Ye Tian's strength was so terrifying, his physical body alone far surpassed that of other third-class invincibles.

He cultivated the top invincible body robbery Ten Thousand Sources Return to the ruins, and each weight was cultivated to the most perfect state, under the superposition, even if the Netherworld Temple cultivated the top invincible body robbery third-class invincible body, it was far inferior to him in terms of physical body robbery.

What's more, the Shattered Void created by Ye Tian was the top spatial invincible skill, and its power was even more terrifying.

Rumble!

Shattered Void directly annihilated the area where Beihe was located, and the layers of invincible defensive skills on his body were shattered, and even the many defensive treasures and defensive robberies on his body couldn't stop the Shattered Void move at all, and all of them were directly shattered.

But after all, this third-class invincible person entered the ranks of third-class invincibles early, and he was not even very far away from the second-class invincible, so he was not killed by a single blow, but was severely injured, and half of his body disappeared, and it was difficult to recover in a short time.

"How can you be so strong?"

Beihe was stunned.

This third-rank invincible person of the Heavenly Wind Sea was so terrifying that it was simply comparable to those Void Sons of the Netherworld.

The Son of the Void is the title of the top genius of the Netherworld, all of them are invincible at the same level, and there are only six Sons of the Void in the entire Netherworld Hall so far, each of them is in different realms of the invincible, and the Son of the Void of the third-class invincible is just the strength that Ye Tian showed just now.

"Could it be that this person is the Son of the Void of the Heavenly Wind Sea, and the Heavenly Wind Sea is willing to send the Son of the Void, so he is not afraid of the fall of the Son of the Void?"

North River is incredulous.

He didn't think too much about it, he only wanted to run away at the moment.

However, he couldn't escape, and could only hope that the other third-class invincibles would come to the rescue in time.

Ye Tian used an invincible ancestral skill of the speed class, quickly caught up with Beihe, and used another invincible ancestral skill, the Tianji Battle Skill.

Click!

Beihe's body was torn apart again, and after healing, Beihe's body was even more mutilated.

"Die!"

Ye Tian shattered Beihe's last chance and put away his broken head as a voucher for submitting tasks in the future.

In this way, a third-class invincible person fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Jinhe Division.

Mu Sen, the third-class invincible man who commanded this war, sensed that Beihe's aura dissipated, and his expression suddenly changed.

"It's not good, Beihe has fallen!"

Hearing Mu Sen's words, the other invincibles were shocked.

Beihe is a third-class invincible, even if he encounters a more powerful third-class invincible, it is no problem to escape.

Moreover, Beihe just asked for help and was killed so quickly?

Unless Beihe encounters a number of top third-class invincibles, the other party joins forces to kill Beihe.

Not long after, another third-class invincible in the Nether Temple fell.

At this time, the Netherworld Temple already knew that the Heavenly Wind Sea had dispatched an extremely powerful third-rank invincible, and he was able to kill a third-rank invincible person alone.

In desperation, the Netherworld begged for help from the Netherworld headquarters, otherwise more third-class invincibles would be killed.

......

The Heavenly Lin Realm, the headquarters of the Netherworld.

A first-class invincible person in the Netherworld Temple was discussing what to do with the affairs of Jinhe Heaven and Earth.

Either withdraw or fight.

In the end, the hall master of the Nether Temple issued an order to send the Son of the Void, a third-class invincible person of the Nether Temple, to let the Son of the Void face the other party and turn the tide of the battle.

And on the side of Tianfeng Hai, he soon got the news that the Netherworld Temple sent the Void Child.

Tianfenghai headquarters.

The Qingyang Supreme and the other first-class invincible supremes were discussing the actions of the Netherworld Palace.

"Why did the Nether Temple suddenly send a Void Child, aren't they afraid that we will pay a huge price to kill their Void Child?" one of the Supremes wondered.

Qingyang Supreme explained: "According to our information, it was a third-rank invincible from our Tianfeng Sea who killed several of them third-rank invincible, and this third-rank invincible person estimated the combat power of the Void Child, so the Netherworld Temple could only send the third-rank invincible Void Child. "

Qingyang Supreme's words made the Supremes present stunned.

Could it be that they sent the Children of the Void before?

That's not right!

There are only five Void Sons in the Heavenly Wind Sea, and there are no Void Sons in the third-rank invincible realm!
